hooks.prompt: Before editing, verify: (1) You have read this file recently and know its current content. (2) The old_str matches the file EXACTLY — including whitespace, indentation, and line breaks. (3) The change is minimal and focused. If unsure about the current content, read the file first.
If the edit failed: STOP. Read the file to see its actual current state before retrying. Do NOT guess or re-attempt with the same old_str — verify the exact content first.
